{"activeBranchId":0,"chainList":[{"description":"施放共鸣技能赫羽三相或重击焚身以火时，长离的抗打断能力提升，且造成的伤害提升10%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1719547854786.png","name":"隐我所思","order":1,"unlocked":true},{"description":"获得【离火】时，长离的暴击提升25%，持续8秒。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1719547178352.png","name":"循我所望","order":2,"unlocked":true},{"description":"共鸣解放离火照丹心造成的伤害提升80%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1719547628031.png","name":"据我所闻","order":3,"unlocked":true},{"description":"施放变奏技能后，队伍中的角色攻击提升20%，持续30秒。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1719547113824.png","name":"饰我所言","order":4,"unlocked":true},{"description":"重击焚身以火倍率提升50%，造成的伤害提升50%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1719547471749.png","name":"舍我所得","order":5,"unlocked":true},{"description":"共鸣技能赫羽三相、重击焚身以火和共鸣解放离火照丹心攻击造成伤害时额外忽视目标40%防御。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1719547251688.png","name":"成我所谋","order":6,"unlocked":true}],"equipPhantomAddPropList":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"4560","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png"},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"1829","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"41.7%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625901965.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"144.2%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png"},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"10.8%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625923096.png"},{"attributeName":"共鸣技能伤害加成","attributeValue":"38.2%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766626039468.png"},{ 在首位装配该声骸技能时，自身热熔伤害加成提升12.00%，共鸣技能伤害加成提升12.00%。
长按声骸技能，持续幻形为燎照之骑并进入骑行状态，结束时对前方的目标造成一次283.50%的热熔伤害。

技能冷却：8秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21.0%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣技能伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"14-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true}]},{"cost":1,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"热熔伤害提升10%","groupId":2,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735783130104.png","name":"熔山裂谷","num":5,"secondDescription":"使用共鸣技能后，热熔伤害提升30%，持续15秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"18.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625555859.png","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"2280","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625604410.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":1,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1716031834727.png","name":"绿熔蜥（稚形）","phantomId":390070078,"phantomPropId":60000285,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，幻形为绿熔蜥（稚形），在原地休息，能够缓慢回复生命值。
 技能冷却：8秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣技能伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"14-1","valid":true}]}]},"role":{"acronym":"cl","attributeId":2,"attributeName":"热熔","breach":6,"chainUnlockNum":6,"isMainRole":false,"level":90,"roleIconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_icon/1733902321111.png","roleId":1205,"roleName":"长离","rolePicUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_pic/1766623606134.png","starLevel":5,"weaponTypeId":2,"weaponTypeName":"迅刀"},"roleAttributeList":[{"attributeId":2,"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"14947","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png","sort":1000},{"attributeId":7,"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"3377","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png","sort":2000},{"attributeId":10,"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"1099","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625832584.png","sort":3000},{"attributeId":8,"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"65.5%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625901965.png","sort":5000},{"attributeId":9,"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"347.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png","sort":6000},{"attributeId":11,"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"100%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625923096.png","sort":7000},{"attributeId":141,"attributeName":"偏谐值累积效率","attributeValue":"100.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625821120.png","sort":7500},{"attributeId":14,"attributeName":"共鸣技能伤害加成","attributeValue":"70%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766626039468.png","sort":8000},{"attributeId":23,"attributeName":"热熔伤害加成","attributeValue":"40.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625261763.png","sort":14000}],"roleSkin":{"isAddition":false,"picUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_pic/1766623286190.png","priority":90,"quality":501,"qualityName":"特别定制","roleId":1205,"skinIcon":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_icon/1749625885144.png","skinId":81011205,"skinName":"桂枝宁芙"},"skillList":[{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"普攻
进行最多4段的连续攻击，造成热熔伤害。
施放地面普攻第4段后进入心眼状态，持续12秒。

空中攻击
消耗耐力，在空中进行最多4段的连续攻击，造成热熔伤害。
施放空中攻击第4段后进入心眼状态，持续12秒。

重击
在地面长按普攻，消耗耐力上挑攻击目标，造成热熔伤害。一定时间内短按普攻将会施放空中攻击第3段。

空中重击
在空中长按普攻或施放普攻心眼·冲后一定时间内短按普攻，消耗耐力进行空中下落攻击，造成热熔伤害。一定时间内短按普攻将会施放普攻第3段。

闪避反击
成功闪避后一定时间内短按普攻，将会攻击目标，造成热熔伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1719546761765.png","id":321,"name":"衔火洞明","skillBranches":[],"type":"常态攻击"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"心眼·劫
短按共鸣技能，长离在空间内高速攻击敌人后进入心眼状态，持续12秒，并最终施放一次向下冲刺攻击造成热熔伤害。
初始拥有2次可使用次数，每12秒可使用次数增加1次，可使用次数上限2次。
可以在空中施放。

普攻·心眼·征
心眼状态下，长离在地面短按普攻，将会施放心眼·征，快速接近敌人并造成热熔伤害，施放后退出心眼状态，此次伤害为共鸣技能伤害。

普攻·心眼·冲
心眼状态下，长离短按跳跃或在空中短按普攻，将会施放心眼·冲，快速接近敌人并造成热熔伤害，施放后退出心眼状态，此次伤害为共鸣技能伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1719546867994.png","id":322,"name":"赫羽三相","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣技能"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"对周围目标造成热熔伤害，获得4层【离火】，并进入焰羽状态。
可以在空中施放。

焰羽
10秒内施放重击焚身以火时攻击提升25%，施放后效果提前结束。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1719546933664.png","id":323,"name":"离火照丹心","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣解放"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"长离出现在空中，攻击目标并进入心眼状态，持续12秒。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1719546879602.png","id":326,"name":"天道持枢","skillBranches":[],"type":"变奏技能"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"重击·焚身以火
施放重击时，若长离拥有4层【离火】，将会消耗所有【离火】施放焚身以火攻击目标造成热熔伤害，此次伤害为共鸣技能伤害。
施放焚身以火期间，长离受到伤害降低40%。

离火获取规则
【离火】上限4层。
施放普攻心眼·征命中目标时，获得1层【离火】。
施放普攻心眼·冲命中目标时，获得1层【离火】。
施放共鸣解放离火照丹心时，获得4层【离火】。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1719546618715.png","id":327,"name":"焚身以火","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣回路"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":1,"skill":{"description":"下一位登场角色热熔伤害加深20%，共鸣解放伤害加深25%，效果持续10秒，若切换至其他角色则该效果提前结束。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1719546582417.png","id":328,"name":"奇正相生","skillBranches":[],"type":"延奏技能"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":1,"skill":{"description":"目标【偏谐值】满时，可对其施放"【谐度破坏】"。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1773804691508.png","id":776,"name":"谐度破坏·迅刀","skillBranches":[],"type":"谐度破坏"}}],"weaponData":{"breach":6,"level":90,"mainPropList":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"587","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/131/weapon_attribute_icon/1766626065937.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"48.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/131/weapon_attribute_icon/1766626178835.png"}],"resonLevel":5,"weapon":{"effectDescription":"攻击提升24%。造成伤害时获得1层【灼羽】，每0.5秒可获得1层。施放共鸣技能时额外获得5层。每层【灼羽】使共鸣技能伤害加成提升8%，可叠加14层。【灼羽】达到14层的10秒后，清空全部层数。","weaponEffectName":"丹煌灼羽","weaponIcon":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/29/weapon_icon/1719564025927.png","weaponId":21020016,"weaponName":"赫奕流明","weaponStarLevel":5,"weaponType":2}}}
